ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "cat_no" TEXT /* Category number of the job posting */,
  "name_of_post" TEXT /* Name of the post being advertised */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the job posting (e.g., STATEWIDE, DISTRICT WISE) */,
  "date_of_examination" TEXT /* Date and time of the examination */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department or organization offering the job */,
  "recruitment_method" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruitment method */,
  "application_start_date" TEXT /* Date when applications start being accepted */,
  "application_end_date" TEXT /* Date when applications stop being accepted */,
  "vacancies" INTEGER /* Number of vacancies for the post */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Specific qualifications required for the job */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of the salary for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job */,
  "application_form_link" TEXT /* Link to the application form for the job posting */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_recruitment_method FOREIGN KEY ("recruitment_method") REFERENCES recruitment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_posted_by FOREIGN KEY ("posted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department or organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment method (e.g., Direct Recruitment, Transfer Recruitment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recruitment method */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed eligibility criteria for the recruitment method */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Steps involved in the application process */,
  "selection_process" TEXT /* Steps involved in the selection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting associated with the examination */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the examination */,
  "exam_location" TEXT /* Location of the examination */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the examination (e.g., Written, Practical) */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination in minutes */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the examination */,
  "exam_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the user who will supervise the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examinations_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examinations_exam_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("exam_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the candidate */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the candidate */,
  "resume_link" TEXT /* Link to the candidate's resume */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the application is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, reviewed, selected) */,
  "application_form" TEXT /* File path to the application form */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "references" TEXT /* File paths to references provided by the candidate */,
  "interview_scheduled" TEXT /* Date and time of the scheduled interview (if applicable) */,
  "interviewer" INTEGER /* ID of the user who will conduct the interview (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_interviewer FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who took the examination */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the candidate */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was announced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or remarks about the candidate's performance */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the examination results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_results_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who was selected */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was selected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the selection (e.g., confirmed, rejected) */,
  "job_start_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate is expected to start the job */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "contract_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract (if applicable) */,
  "confirmed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who confirmed the selection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_confirmed_by FOREIGN KEY ("confirmed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hiring manager, candidate, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (encrypted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
